entity.summary: South Korean centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2017 as the Korean arm of Huobi/HTX. Huobi Korea separated its management and ownership relationship from the global exchange in January 2023, then ended virtual-asset exchange services on 2024-01-29 because of a difficult business environment.
entity.notes: HEI uses voluntary_shutdown because the exchange's announcement framed the closure as a business-environment decision. The former official domain now serves unrelated Korean content and is treated as repurposed.

events.title: Huobi Korea was established as Huobi's Korean exchange
events.description: Huobi Korea began operating in 2017 as the South Korean arm of the global Huobi exchange group.
events.notes: Year-level launch precision is retained because the current source set establishes 2017 but not a precise day.

events.title: Huobi Korea separated from the global Huobi and HTX business
events.description: Huobi Korea cut its ownership and management ties with Huobi Global and HTX and continued as an independent domestic exchange.
events.notes: Modeled as an identity transition because ownership independence materially changed the exchange's relationship to the global Huobi lineage.

events.title: Huobi Korea ended virtual-asset exchange services
events.description: Huobi Korea terminated its exchange services on 2024-01-29 after concluding that the current business environment made continued operation impractical. Customer withdrawals remained available after the shutdown.

evidence.title: Huobi Korea wallet maintenance notice
evidence.notes: Primary historical operational notice establishing the Huobi Korea exchange service.

evidence.title: Huobi Korea shuts down platform citing business difficulties
evidence.notes: Retrospective source states that Huobi Korea was established in 2017.

evidence.title: Huobi Korea shuts down platform citing business difficulties
evidence.notes: Reports that the Korean business cut ties with HTX and Huobi Global in January 2023.

evidence.title: Huobi Korea shuts down platform citing business difficulties
evidence.notes: Secondary confirmation of the 2017 establishment and January 2023 separation.

evidence.title: Huobi Korea announces that it will cease services on January 29
evidence.notes: Preserves the announced 2024-01-29 service termination date and continuing withdrawal access.

evidence.title: Huobi Korea shuts down platform citing business difficulties
evidence.notes: Independent report quotes the exchange's business-environment rationale and the January 29 shutdown date.
